Valentine’s Day Email Promotion #2			                Copyright Free Template



Subject Line:  Give yourself the [insert product] you’ll love



Dear [first name], 



Valentine’s Day is just around the corner.  



And whether you’re looking forward to spending time 

with your significant other, or you’re dreading it…we decided

to love you unconditionally with this special offer. 



[Insert offer details here]



Why are we doing this? Because we LOVE you and want to 

do something special for you.  



[insert benefits they’ll get when they take up offer]



So whether you’re looking to [insert transformation, 

like get fit, get more customers], you’ll want to take 

action before [insert date]. 



Otherwise, you’ll miss out for good, and this Valentine’s

Day will be heartbreaking for you. 



Don’t let that happen. Go here….



[insert offer link]



…and ensure this Valentine’s day will be memorable...even after the flowers die out and the candy gets eaten. 



(your name) 



P.S. Remember, once [insert date] goes away, this 

offer is off the table, and you’ll have to wait until next

year. So take action today.
